word: G4148 - πλουτίζω - ploutízō - ploo-tid'-zo - En- rich

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πλουτίζω

- Transliteration: Ploutizo

- Phonetic: ploo-tid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to make rich, enrich

a. of spiritual riches

2. to be richly furnished

- Origin: from G4149

- TDNT entry: 11:18,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4149; to make wealthy (figuratively): - en- (make) rich.
